plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the complete plan — **8 files, 3 new + 5 edited, zero new dependencies, zero build config changes**.

---

## What was found

- A `useTheme` hook already exists (`hooks/useTheme.ts`) using module-level state + `useSyncExternalStore` for light/dark/system — **replaced** by the new system
- CSS uses Tailwind v4 with `@theme inline` + CSS custom properties; dark mode is toggled via `.dark` class on `<html>` — all existing `dark:` Tailwind utilities stay working because `isDark` keeps `.dark` in sync
- Settings page has an Appearance section with a manual radio group — swapped for `<ThemeSelector />`
- `packages/shared` uses plain TypeScript subpath exports — the new `./theme` export follows that exact pattern

---

## 8-step plan

| Step | File | Action |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `packages/shared/src/theme.ts` | **Create** — `ThemeId`, `ThemeDefinition`, `ThemeColors`, `THEMES`, `THEME_IDS`, `DEFAULT_THEME_ID` |
| 2 | `packages/shared/package.json` | **Edit** — add `"./theme"` subpath export |
| 3 | `apps/web/src/index.css` | **Edit** — add `--sidebar/--editor/--terminal/--status-bar` defaults to `:root`, then three `[data-theme="t3-light/dark/midnight"]` CSS blocks |
| 4 | `apps/web/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx` | **Create** — `ThemeContext`, `ThemeProvider`, `applyTheme()` (sets `data-theme` attr + toggles `.dark`), flash-prevention at module load, cross-tab storage sync |
| 5 | `apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts` | **Rewrite** — thin `useContext(ThemeContext)` wrapper; returns `{ themeId, theme, setTheme }` |
| 6 | `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` | **Create** — 3-column swatch grid; each card shows sidebar/editor/terminal/status-bar strips + accent dot using inline `style` |
| 7 | `apps/web/src/router.ts` | **Edit** — wrap existing `Wrap` tree with `ThemeProvider` as the outermost provider |
| 8 | `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` | **Edit** — replace radio group with `<ThemeSelector />`, update destructuring from old `{ theme, setTheme, resolvedTheme }` to `{ theme }` |
